Thanks for the PR! Please fill this in so review is quick.

## What

A short summary of the change.

## Why

The problem this solves, or the motivation.

## Manual test steps

Which of the flows in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#testing-your-change)
did you run? Anything new that should be added there?

- [ ] Recorded a crawl on `demo/` and replayed it green
- [ ] Ran the chaos-controls flow and got an OMG + BOOM
- [ ] Exercised the multi-page flow ("Continue to page two")
- [ ] Export → Import round-trip
- [ ] AUTO on a saved crawl fires once on reload
- [ ] Consent panel works on a non-`localhost` origin
- [ ] Other:

## Screenshots / video

If the change is visual, drop a before/after here.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused (one purpose per PR)
- [ ] I updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `Unreleased`
- [ ] I did not add network calls, telemetry, or new permissions
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
